case_title: YAN DA XIN VS. GREAT WALL CONTRACTORS, INC. et al

docket_entries.description: UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF XIN, YAN DA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT GREAT WALL CONTRACTORS, INC. CHOW, YUK SOON AN INDIVIDUAL $10,046.94 PRINCIPAL, $84.62 INTEREST, $330.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $10,461.56, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
